text: I ordered a set of three items, but only two showed up in the delivery. I was expecting the full order and it's quite frustrating. I can't decide if I should just let it go or if I should insist on a refund for what I didn't get. It's been a hassle trying to sort this out, especially since I was looking forward to using all of them together.
I feel so frustrated because the premium features I paid for aren’t accessible, and I’m really counting on them to work. This was supposed to make my life easier, but now I'm just disappointed.

Hello, i noticed that my account was charged for a service that I did not use this month and it looks like there's been a mistake with the billing. Can you please help me with this? I would really appreciate it if you could process a refund or at least clarify what's going on.
